expectations.text: Skill does NOT re-ask audience, goal, scope, or length since all are in the prompt
expectations.name: skips_already_answered_intake

expectations.evidence: style cues from reference present in design system
expectations.name: reads_referenced_style_file

expectations.text: Brainstorm file contains exactly 7 slide sections (SLIDE 01 through SLIDE 07)
expectations.name: produces_7_slide_brainstorm

expectations.text: Brainstorm references hairlines, manuscript rows, italic accent word, or other terms from references/design-vocabulary.md
expectations.name: uses_design_vocabulary

expectations.text: DESIGN SYSTEM or per-slide layout explicitly limits cards consistent with the reference style
expectations.name: low_card_count

expectations.text: Skill does NOT produce a .pptx, .html, or .pdf file
expectations.name: refuses_to_build_actual_deck
